payload.text: Heartbeat: run your board lead loop per HEARTBEAT.md — pre-flight checks, task review, delivery status update. Return HEARTBEAT_OK if nothing needs attention.

Standup synthesis. Get today's date, then read ../../standups/<TODAY>.md. First check if the standup file for today contains STANDUP_SKIPPED. If it does, stop immediately and do nothing. Otherwise: (1) append a ## Summary section: cross-project synthesis of the Context — which PRs need attention, what is moving, what is blocked, anything time-sensitive. Keep it to 5-8 bullet points. (2) append a ## quality-manager section with four subsections: ### Working on / ### New insight — may affect others / ### Question for the team / ### Response to [agent name]. (3) append a ## Standup cost subsection under quality-manager estimating your input tokens, output tokens, tool calls, and model used. Commit the standup file.

Standup contribution. Get today's date, then read ../../standups/<TODAY>.md (full file). First check if the standup file for today contains STANDUP_SKIPPED. If it does, stop immediately and do nothing. Otherwise read the entire file including any prior sections, then append your ## engine-dev section with four subsections: ### Working on (what you are currently doing and why it matters) / ### New insight — may affect others (leave blank if nothing) / ### Question for the team (use @agent-id to be specific) / ### Response to [agent name] (only if a prior section raised something relevant to your domain). Append a brief cost estimate (input tokens / output tokens / tool calls / model). Commit the standup file.

Standup contribution. Get today's date, then read ../../standups/<TODAY>.md (full file). First check if the standup file for today contains STANDUP_SKIPPED. If it does, stop immediately and do nothing. Otherwise read the entire file including any prior sections, then append your ## console-dev section with four subsections: ### Working on / ### New insight — may affect others / ### Question for the team / ### Response to [agent name]. Append a brief cost estimate. Commit the standup file.

Standup contribution. Get today's date, then read ../../standups/<TODAY>.md (full file). First check if the standup file for today contains STANDUP_SKIPPED. If it does, stop immediately and do nothing. Otherwise read the entire file including any prior sections, then append your ## site-dev section with four subsections: ### Working on / ### New insight — may affect others / ### Question for the team / ### Response to [agent name]. Append a brief cost estimate. Commit the standup file.

Standup contribution. Get today's date, then read ../../standups/<TODAY>.md (full file). First check if the standup file for today contains STANDUP_SKIPPED. If it does, stop immediately and do nothing. Otherwise read the entire file including any prior sections, then append your ## programme-manager section with four subsections: ### Working on / ### New insight — may affect others / ### Question for the team / ### Response to [agent name]. Append a brief cost estimate. Commit the standup file.

payload.message:
Run the backlog export: bash /home/node/workspace/scripts/export-backlog.sh

That's all. No other work needed.
